untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'intrabar reversal pattern off key support/resistance' and 'bid-ask imbalance' which are qualitative pattern-recognition concepts not expressible with the allowed quantitative indicators. Bid-ask data is not available in the indicator set. The core logic is also conceptual (timeframe bias and avoiding intermediate timeframes) rather than mechanically testable without additional micro-structure indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted a minimal representation using tick-level proxies (body direction, volume ratio confirmation, tight profit targets of 1-2 ticks ~0.02%, and 1-tick stops) to capture the ultra-short-term scalp intent. However, the signal's emphasis on support/resistance reversal patterns and bid-ask imbalance requires unavailable indicators. This translation should not be used without substantial refinement and access to L2 order book data.
